::: {.title-slide-container}
::: {.title-slide-content}
:::: {.columns}

<!-- Title slide logo -->
::: {.column .logo width="32%"}
![](images/logo-title-slide.png)
:::

<!-- Title slide content -->
::: {.column .information width="68%"}

::: {.title}
The Datascience at FRB-CESAB
:::

::: {.subtitle}
What kind of support do we offer?
:::

::: {.date}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
olocale <- Sys.getlocale("LC_TIME")
invisible(Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "en_US.UTF-8"))
cat(format(Sys.Date(), "%B %Y"))
invisible(Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", olocale))
```
:::

:::: {.columns .authors}

::: {.column .author width="32%"}
Nicolas Casajus<br/>
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:nicolas.casajus@fondationbiodiversite.fr)
[{{< fa globe >}}](https://nicolascasajus.fr)
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/ahasverus)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5537-5294)
[{{< ai google-scholar >}}](https://scholar.google.fr/citations?user=n1swa1UAAAAJ)
:::

::: {.column .author width="32%"}
Camille Coux<br/>
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:camille.coux@fondationbiodiversite.fr)
[{{< fa globe >}}](https://camillecoux.github.io/)
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CamilleCoux)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6346-9194)
[{{< ai google-scholar >}}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=BGywDqsAAAAJ)
:::

<!-- Third author -->
::: {.column .author width="32%"}
Romain Frelat<br/>
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:romain.frelat@fondationbiodiversite.fr)
[{{< fa globe >}}](https://rfrelat.github.io/)
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/rfrelat)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8631-4398)
[{{< ai google-scholar >}}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=BvrKmSYAAAAJ)
:::

<!-- Close {.columns .authors} -->
::::

:::: {.columns .affiliations}

::: {.column .affiliation width="32%"}
Data scientists
<br/>
<code>@FRB-CESAB</code>
&nbsp;
[{{< fa globe >}}](https://www.fondationbiodiversite.fr/en/about-the-foundation/le-cesab/)
&nbsp;
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/frbcesab)
:::

<!-- Second affiliation -->
::: {.column .affiliation width="32%"}
<!--
{{< fa house >}} &nbsp;[Affiliation](affiliation-url)
-->
:::

<!-- Third affiliation -->
::: {.column .affiliation width="32%"}
<!--
{{< fa house >}} &nbsp;[Affiliation](affiliation-url)
-->
:::



<!-- Close {.columns .affiliations} -->
::::

<!-- Close {.column .information} -->
:::

<!-- Close {.columns} -->
::::

<!-- Close {.title-slide-content} -->
:::

<!-- Close {.title-slide-container} -->
:::
